headline: Cooper Companies Guidance Upgrade Highlights Strength In Premium Vision Portfolio
summary: Cooper Companies (NasdaqGS:COO) reported strong Q1 results, highlighting solid performance in its core businesses. The company raised its full year earnings and free cash flow guidance following the quarter. Cooper Companies marked its 18th consecutive year of market share gains in vision care products. Recent momentum has been supported by premium products such as MyDay and MiSight lenses, along with improving trends in its surgical unit. For investors tracking medical device and vision...
